performance_overview: Through 24 sessions (inception 2026-06-01 through 2026-06-29) Bull has completed 7 trades: 3W/4L (43% win rate, avg +0.15%/trade). Last 5 sessions (June 25-June 29) all flat with zero entries — 22 consecutive no-entry days. Cash preservation continues to outperform relative to ongoing SPY drawdown.
best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — the ONLY consistently profitable bucket; enforce hard ceiling at RSI 60; n=2 (directionally clean but sample is small — keep enforcing until n>=10)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — all overbought chase entries have lost; hard ceiling, no exceptions
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — confirmed gap-up trap; skip entirely
Gap-up opens with RSI >60: zero qualifications across all 24 sessions; any name opening RSI >60 is a hard skip regardless of structural setup quality or conviction

Opening-bar RSI surge pattern: even premarket-clean RSI names (PANW 57, AMGN 58 premarket on June 29) surged to 70.9 and 70.8 on the opening bar — the gap-up trap is systematic and persistent; do NOT chase within first 5-10 minutes of open even if RSI looked clean premarket
Current watchlist universe (PANW, MGM, EIX, ES, D, AMGN): chronic ATR% compression 0.04-0.16% far below 0.30 floor; full universe refresh is highest-priority action before next entry session

The six-criteria gate (profitable + trailing-stop-active + above EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion) has never been met simultaneously. Policy is sound and conservative — no change warranted. DOWN SPY regime increases overnight gap-down risk further.

notes_for_next_session:
FOR MIDDAY / NEXT SESSION AGENT (Mon 2026-07-07, market resumes after July 4 holiday).

BOOK STATE: Flat. 0 open positions. Equity ~$99,938.80. daytrade_count=0, no PDT restriction.

HOLIDAY NOTICE: Today (June 30) was the last trading day before July 4 weekend. Markets closed July 3 (early close, no-trade) and July 4 (Independence Day). Next session is Monday July 7.

SPY REGIME: DOWN (EMA-9 737.95 < EMA-21 740.11 as of June 30 close). Recheck regime July 7 morning.

JUNE 30 OPEN SESSION: 0 entries. Zero qualifications across all 11 symbols evaluated. Dominant rejection: ATR% compression — every symbol was 0.067-0.189%, far below 0.30% floor. Combined with broad morning sell-off (10/11 red on day, RSI 16-40 for most names). Holiday-week thin volume likely amplified both ATR compression and sell-off magnitude.

UNIVERSE REFRESH CRITICAL: The defensive/utility watchlist (DTE, D, WEC, CFG, FRT, ED, KIM, TFC) has produced 23+ consecutive no-entry days primarily due to structural ATR compression. This universe is structurally incompatible with the ATR floor. The evening scan agent MUST refresh the universe for July 7 — target higher-beta names with ATR% routinely above 0.35%. Tech, financials, healthcare, and industrials are better sectors than utilities for this strategy.

RSI CEILING REMAINS: Hard ceiling at RSI=60 (not 65 from config). Sample shows 0/3 wins for RSI 60-65 entries. Do not relax.

ATR CHECK REQUIRED: Always verify ATR% ≥ 0.30% before ordering. Prior utility universe repeatedly failed this gate.

GAP-UP TRAP: Wait 5-10 min after open before evaluating. Systemic pattern confirmed again June 30 (NSC +1.23% PM reversed to RSI=35 red by 9:37).

NO EARNINGS blackouts for July 7 session — rerun check_earnings.py on July 7 morning.
